- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Clinical notes in the config:
- CU-001: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- Fact: I successfully retrieved the latest dosing config.
- Fact: The patient notes look generally stable.
- Important limitation: I have not checked live model diagnostics or monitoring outputs, so I can’t honestly confirm that the PK models themselves are currently stable based on this file alone.

If you want, I can next do a targeted check for whatever monitoring or validation files are available and give you a more defensible PK stability status.
